_comment: Example UniFi guest-network captive portal hook. The portal posts this object to the controller's /api/s/<site>/cmd/hotspot endpoint when a guest requests a voucher; before the controller actually issues one, the trustforge-unifi-plugin intercepts the request and POSTs a /v1/decide call to the local tf-daemon. If the daemon answers `decision: allow`, the controller proceeds; otherwise the voucher is rejected and the client is kept on the captive-portal VLAN.

_trustforge_decide_response_handling.allow: create voucher and redirect client to success page
_trustforge_decide_response_handling.deny: do NOT create voucher; redirect to /portal/declined.html
_trustforge_decide_response_handling.ask: queue request for operator review; show /portal/pending.html
_trustforge_decide_response_handling.error: fail closed (do NOT create voucher) and log the daemon error
